problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
